---
title: "Inputs"
---

This section describes the inputs accepted by `check-datapackage`.

- The Data Package properties: This is a Python dictionary containing
  the metadata of a Data Package. Allowed properties are defined in the
  [Data Package standard](https://datapackage.org/). A common use case
  is loading the properties from the `datapackage.json` file.
- The configuration settings: Values that control how
  `check-datapackage` behaves (like which content to include in the
  output, how to format it, and where to save it). These can be provided
  as command-line arguments, via a Python class, or within a
  configuration file.
